s = sorted(lst)
    res = []
    low, high = 0, len(s) - 1
    take_low = True
    while low <= high:
        if take_low:
            res.append(s[low])
            low += 1
        else:
            res.append(s[high])
            high -= 1
        take_low = not take_low
    return res
